title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Hi Papa
subTitle: A loving father and his young daughter face life-altering changes when his romantic interest weds another man, challenging their bond and reshaping their future together.

title: Shivam
subTitle: Shiva is a carefree lad who helps couples in love marry. Soon, he finds his own heart stolen, while being pursued by enemies determined to break them apart.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Khichadi 2
subTitle: An intelligence services agent notices the resemblance between Praful and the king of Paanthukistan. This prompts him to seek the Parekhs' help to have Praful take the position to save the people.

title: Jai Simha
subTitle: Narasimha, a fiery but kind-hearted mechanic, becomes the guardian of an innocent family. Subsequently, he ends up taking on the ruthless kingpin Kariappan and his violent gang to protect them.

title: Kick
subTitle: Devi, a man who cannot stay put as he is addicted to going on new adventures, breaks up with his girlfriend, Shaina, who is a Warsaw-based psychiatrist, just to pursue his daredevil ambitions.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: Pooja, a criminologist, along with Arjun, a CBI official, tries to solve two interlinked cases of murder and money laundering. As they investigate the crimes, the conspiracy intensifies.

title: Rowdy Rajkumar 2
subTitle: An emotionless man lives off his father's wealth. He learns a lesson when he runs into a poor man and decides to swap his life with him.

title: Daring Policewala
subTitle: Police constable Mathimaran investigates illegal organ donations and tries to put an end to the suffering of innocent people.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Om Bheem Bhush
subTitle: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: Mera Badla: Revenge
subTitle: Shankar Rao, a businessman, and his family start witnessing strange events in their house. Thereafter, he calls Dr Vijay, a psychiatrist, to help him.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Geetha Govindam
subTitle: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Supreme Khiladi
subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Bachchan Pandey
subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

title: Fighter No. 1
subTitle: Raja, a former boxer, becomes smitten with Lakshmi, who is visually impaired. Soon, he resumes boxing to raise money for restoring her eyesight.

title: Uunchai
subTitle: When three retired friends go on a trek to the Everest Base Camp to fulfil their dying friend's last wish, they discover the true meaning of freedom and life.

title: Acharya
subTitle: On behalf of an idyllic temple town, Acharya takes up the cudgels against a tyrant whose greedy sights are set on the local natural resources.

title: Jai Simha
subTitle: Narasimha, a fiery but kind-hearted mechanic, becomes the guardian of an innocent family. Subsequently, he ends up taking on the ruthless kingpin Kariappan and his violent gang to protect them.

title: Raksha Bandhan
subTitle: Embracing his role as the provider, Lala Kedarnath puts personal romantic interests on the back burner until his quirky sisters can be married off into loving families.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
subTitle: A young man, who lives happily with his family but is scared of ghosts, visits Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with his family. There, he is soon possessed by a vengeful ghost with a sinister past.

title: Marakastra
subTitle: Marakastra

title: Yuvarathnaa
subTitle: When the college is now on the verge of closing, a dedicated principal must fight against the privatisation of education system to save the college.
